name: Graph Break
description: Dynamo cannot trace through a code pattern — splits the graph

name: Excessive Recompilation
description: Too many guard mismatches cause repeated compilation

name: Compilation OOM
description: Out of memory during compilation (not runtime)

name: Runtime OOM
description: Out of memory when executing compiled code

name: CUDAGraph OOM
description: Out of memory specific to CUDA graph capture/replay — common with large models

name: Slow Compilation
description: Compilation takes excessively long (minutes to hours)

name: Compilation Hang
description: Compilation process hangs indefinitely — distinct from slow compile

name: Incorrect Output
description: Compiled code produces different results than eager mode

name: Numerical Issue
description: Numerical drift or precision differences between compiled and eager — distinct from wrong output. May be bitwise parity requirement or acceptable drift threshold.

name: Internal Error / Crash
description: Unhandled exception during compilation or execution

name: Performance Regression
description: Compiled code runs slower than eager mode

name: Export Failure
description: torch.export cannot capture the model graph

name: Backward Pass Failure
description: Compilation succeeds for forward but fails during backward

name: Compile Cache Miss
description: Expected cache hit doesn't happen — triggers unnecessary recompilation

name: Performance Improvement
description: Compiled code is faster than eager but user wants more speedup — suboptimal fusion, kernel selection, or missed optimization opportunities. Distinct from perf_regression (slower than eager).

name: silent_incorrectness
description: Compiled code produces wrong results without error (e.g., garbage tokens in LLM output)

name: dynamic_shape_error
description: Errors related to unbacked symints, shape inference, or symbolic shape constraints
